name: Tom Harrell
description: American composer, arranger, jazz trumpeter and flugelhornist
abstract: Tom Harrell (born June 16, 1946) is an American jazz trumpeter, flugelhornist, composer, and arranger. Voted Trumpeter of the Year of 2018 by Jazz Journalists Association, Harrell has won awards and grants throughout his career, including multiple Trumpeter of the Year awards from DownBeat magazine, SESAC Jazz Award, BMI (Broadcast Music…

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Goodwin
about_quotes.evidence: when I was doing a Tom Harrell record I had hired Charlie Haden for it... I got to record a bunch of Tom’s records for them and then later the Chesky Brothers, Chesky Records with Tom.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Goodwin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 28, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: I had Harry Leahey first on guitar, then Tom Harrell, I added him on trumpet... Oh yeah that was a great period, especially the band with Tom Harrell and Hal Galper
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: Anything with the quintet I’m really proud of all the quintet stuff, whether it’s with Hal Crook or Tom Harrell or Brian Lynch.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Charles McPherson
about_quotes.evidence: That’s “First Flight Out,” Tom Harrell and Peter Washington, Victor Lewis on drums, Michael Weiss on piano and myself
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles McPherson interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 12, 1998 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I’m jumping quite a bit forward now, to 1989. There’s an interesting Tom Harrell record that I heard a long time ago, called Sail Away. [INTERVIEWEE] Yes, his record. Record date, Bill Goodwin? Bill Goodwin production, I believe?
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Byron Stripling
about_quotes.evidence: people would bring in Roy Hargrove and Tom Harrell and Terrell Stafford, and all people that I love
about_quotes.doc_title: Byron Stripling interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 25, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
